events.label: assistant
events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: welding without a qualified WPS is a fail under AWS D1.1 (Clauses 4/5 require prequalified or tested-and-qualified procedures before production welding), rated high risk since weld integrity can't be assured. Recommended actions include halting welding, NDT on completed joints, re-establishing an approved WPS, and re-inspection before acceptance.
